mdRecord.dcterms:title: 1838 Plan for a New Street from the Mansion House to Southwark Bridge, Opening a communication with Watling Street & St. Paul's Church Yard / Plan of the Parish of Christ-Church, Middlesex
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Map of Plan for a New Street from the Mansion House to Southwark Bridge, Opening a communication with Watling Street & St. Paul's Church Yard / Plan of the Parish of Christ-Church, Middlesex, 21 / 24
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
